advert.description: The Disneyland ad concludes with a price example (£147 per person/night) and the Disney Paris website URL.
The Muller ad shows elderly people eating rice pudding, followed by the Muller logo, and ends with a scene of a man lying back with shaving cream-like substance on his face (presumably the pudding).
The KFC ad includes a segment featuring shaving foam (likely a visual metaphor or transition) before displaying the "KFC Lunch Meal Deal" offer, ending with the KFC logo on a red background.
The ITV competitions portal ad displays a collage of winner photos and the "itv WIN" logo, ending with the QR code and search bar.
The Pensionbee ad features animations of ants and stadium scenes, concluding with the "Pensionbee BE PENSION CONFIDENT" logo and download prompts.
The Findmypast ad shows family tree construction and a forum discussion, ending with a "7-Day Free Trial" call to action.
The Cancer Research UK / Race for Life ad features runners and crowds, ending with a "Sign up today" screen and the race logo.
The Aunt Bessies ad, based on a true story, shows cooking and dining, ending with the "Aunt Bessies Caring is the hardest thing we do" slogan.
